PLAINTIFF RREEF AMERICA REIT III CORP. EE2'S Motion For Assignment Order Re: Rights To Payment Of Money Due Or To Become Due is off calendar. No Proof of Service or courtesy copy. JUDGE CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, NOT REPORTED (CWW/302)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-08-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

E. Michael Linscheid, Esq. appeared for plaintiff RREEF America Reit III Corp. EE2.
Elaine Dell'Aquila, property manager for plaintiff, and Lisa Vogel, a representative for plaintiff, were placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Uniglobe Passport Travel LLC.
Default was entered against defendant on September 2, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed July 7, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff RREEF Reit III Corp. EE2, and against the Defaulted Defendant Uniglobe Passport Travel LLC as follows:

Damages/Principal - $63,970.06.
Prejudgment Interest - $5,185.92.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $415.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $72,395.98.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-24-2010 Continued To Jul-26-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Thomas Hesketh, Esq. appearing specially for the plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to 7/26/2010 at 1:30 PM in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)
